title: androsace subulifera
intro: Androsace subulifera, also known as the Alpine bear's-ear, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Androsace subulifera include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Androsace subulifera often involve infusions of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or salves for various health applications.
